no_changes_rationale:
Bead ddx-1d85c927 (Story 15: server-side prompt input) is an epic.
Its acceptance is "All child beads closed", and the epic had no children
on entry. The full plan at /tmp/story-15-final.md spans 7 coherent slices
crossing ADR, bead schema/state-model, two GraphQL mutation surfaces,
execute-loop wake + backlink events, SvelteKit UI + Playwright, and
multi-node trust forwarding — well past a single bounded-context attempt.

Per execute-bead Step 0 (size check), this attempt only decomposes:

  ddx-a01255a8  S15-1  ADR — Operator-Prompt Beads as Web Write Path
                       (no deps)
  ddx-a8939a2b  S15-2  Bead schema/template/status-model — operator-prompt
                       issueType + 'proposed' status + no-self-mutation
                       (deps: S15-1)
  ddx-a7e7a1a1  S15-3  operatorPromptSubmit mutation w/ CSRF, idempotency,
                       identity-bound first-event audit
                       (deps: S15-2)
  ddx-f3c7149d  S15-4  operatorPromptApprove/cancel + per-project allowlist
                       + auto-approve config flag
                       (deps: S15-3)
  ddx-23c67ca4  S15-5  Execute-loop wake-on-approve + origin_operator_prompt_id
                       backlink events on every affected bead/artifact
                       (deps: S15-4)
  ddx-92e10599  S15-6  SvelteKit prompt input + preview + recent-bead pane
                       + approve UI + Playwright (incl. XSS)
                       (deps: S15-4)
  ddx-256af8b5  S15-7  Multi-node trust attestation forwarding
                       (deps: S15-3, BLOCKING for non-localhost write enablement,
                        also blocked on Story 14 landing)

Dep edges mirror the ordering in /tmp/story-15-final.md §Bead breakdown
(reordered per codex). No source code modified in this attempt.
